steps.t: Túmir's treasure-map and stick-sword can be found in his bedroom. The small stones can be collected outside the house. You should collect everything T…
Túmir is in his father's home in northern Lamedon. You should bring everything you gathered to Túmir.
Fuirion is in Gladion's home in northern Lamedon. You should bring Túmir's gift to Fuirion.
